description: Minimal hybrid MVP fixture used to verify import, publish, assignment, completion, and result visibility end to end.

questions.prompt: When making a decision, I usually...

options.label: Set direction quickly and refine as needed.
Align the team before finalizing the plan.

questions.prompt: In team discussions, I tend to...

options.label: Drive to a clear decision quickly.
Ensure everyone is heard and aligned.

questions.prompt: When work becomes unclear, I prefer to...

options.label: Choose a path and move forward.
Check with stakeholders to align next steps.

overview.highPerformer: Your strongest visible pattern is {topSignalLabel} at {topSignalScorePercent}, with clear expression across this test.
overview.balancedProfile: Your profile is balanced overall; {topSignalLabel} currently leads at {topSignalScorePercent}.
overview.developingProfile: Your current pattern shows a lower-expression lead in {topSignalLabel} at {topSignalScorePercent}; use this as a baseline for growth.
overview.default: This hybrid test profile is ready: {topSignalLabel} is currently the top signal at {topSignalScorePercent}.

sig_decisive.high: {signalLabel} stands out strongly ({normalizedPercent}); you tend to set direction quickly.
sig_decisive.balanced: {signalLabel} is moderate ({normalizedPercent}); you can decide quickly when needed.
sig_decisive.low: {signalLabel} is lower ({normalizedPercent}); you may delay final calls under uncertainty.

sig_analytical.high: {signalLabel} is prominent ({normalizedPercent}); you rely on evidence and logic.
sig_analytical.balanced: {signalLabel} is balanced ({normalizedPercent}); you calibrate depth to context.
sig_analytical.low: {signalLabel} is less expressed ({normalizedPercent}); analysis depth may be skipped in fast cycles.

sig_collaborative.high: {signalLabel} is a clear strength ({normalizedPercent}); you prioritize alignment.
sig_collaborative.balanced: {signalLabel} is balanced ({normalizedPercent}); you collaborate without losing pace.
sig_collaborative.low: {signalLabel} is less expressed ({normalizedPercent}); alignment may come after execution.

dom_work_style.summary: {domainLabel} is currently led by {topSignalLabel} at {topSignalPercent}, making strengths and watchouts easy to inspect in UI tests.
